hooks.command: cat >/dev/null; npx tsc --noEmit && npm test && npm run test:screenshots
hooks.statusMessage: Quality gate: tsc + unit tests + screenshots...

hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command | test("git push")) then {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"QUALITY GATE: You just pushed to git. Before declaring this work done you MUST: (1) run pnpm tsc --noEmit (or npx tsc --noEmit), (2) run npm test, (3) run npm run test:screenshots and verify all pass, (4) confirm new user-facing flows have E2E/screenshot tests, (5) confirm docs updated if behavior changed, (6) do NOT merge locally — push branch and open PR. Do not tell the user the work is done until this checklist is complete."}} | tojson else empty end'
